Selected Work

Projects & Impact

Work Together →
01
UX / UI · Research · Figma

Denver Zoo — End-to-End Ticket Purchase Redesign

Identified critical drop-off points through usability testing with 5 participants. Rebuilt the homepage and purchase flow from 9 steps to 5 — a 44% reduction — using affinity mapping, competitive analysis of 3 peer institutions, and high-fidelity Figma prototyping.

44% Fewer Purchase Steps
5 Users Tested
3 Competitors Analyzed
→
02
Packaging · Brand Identity · Sustainability

Fuchun Ramen — Brand System & Packaging Design

Built a full brand identity and structural packaging system for an instant ramen concept rooted in Chinese heritage. Designed outer wrap, inner cup, and brand pattern system across 3 SKUs — all within a sustainable-materials brief and cost constraints.

3 Packaging SKUs
100% Sustainable Brief
1 Cohesive System
→
03
Editorial · Print · Campaign

Colorado Symphony — Centennial Season Poster & Mailer

Designed a dual-sided poster mailer for the Colorado Symphony's 100th anniversary season. Developed a print system balancing bold headline typography with dense editorial content across 12 separate concert listings — delivering print-ready files on deadline.

12 Concert Listings
100 Year Anniversary
2 Print Sides Designed
→
04
Logo · Brand Identity · Local Business

Brush Creek Bee Keeping — Brand Identity

Created a complete logo and brand identity for a Colorado beekeeping operation. Delivered a mark that communicates craft and local provenance — designed to scale across packaging labels, business cards, signage, and social media without losing legibility or character.

4 Brand Applications
3 Color Variants
∞ Scalable Uses
→
05
Fashion · Textile · Wearable Art

Floral Embroidered Denim — Concept-to-Garment

Took a wearable design concept from initial sketch to finished garment. Hand-applied floral lace appliqué across wide-leg denim — demonstrating material sourcing, textile composition, and fashion-forward thinking at the intersection of design and fabrication.

1 Unique Piece Made
100% Hand-Applied
0 Duplicates Exist
→
06
Typography · Poster · Systems Thinking

Bodoni URW — Type Specimen Poster System

Designed a layered type specimen poster demonstrating full mastery of Bodoni URW across 3 weights and optical sizes. Built as a self-demonstrating system — every layout decision teaches the typeface through its own visual language and compositional hierarchy.

3 Type Weights
26 Glyphs Showcased
1 Visual System
→
Fuchun (福春)

— my middle name
About Me

Tiny, curious,
& destined for this.

I'm Emilee — a CU Boulder designer who moves between disciplines without losing coherence. Whether it's a UX flow, a packaging system, a brand identity, or a piece of wearable art, every project gets the same treatment: research, intention, and craft.

Actively pursuing opportunities in graphic design, UX/UI, digital design, social media, and fashion tech. Fluent across the Adobe Suite and Figma, and comfortable in fast-moving creative teams.

Figma Illustrator Photoshop InDesign After Effects Lightroom Photography Content Strategy
What I Bring

Skills & Disciplines

01
Graphic Design & Brand Identity
Logo systems, color palettes, type, and brand guidelines. I build visual worlds that are cohesive, scalable, and built to last beyond a single deliverable.
IllustratorInDesignFigma
02
UX / UI & Digital Design
User research, affinity mapping, wireframing to high-fidelity prototype. I design digital experiences grounded in real user data — not just aesthetics.
FigmaFigJamUsability Testing
03
Social Media & Content Creation
Platform-native content strategy and visual design. I build for scroll-stopping impact across feeds, stories, and campaigns.
PhotoshopLightroomCanva
04
Packaging & Editorial Design
Structural and graphic packaging, poster systems, mailers, and editorial layouts. I make things look exceptional on shelves and on paper.
IllustratorInDesignDielines
05
Fashion Tech & Wearable Design
Art direction, textile design, and visual storytelling at the fashion-digital intersection. I understand aesthetics at a cultural level — what trends, why, and where it's going.
Art DirectionStylingPhotography

Photography & Motion
Still photography and motion work. I capture moments that feel exactly right — product shots, brand videos, editorial series.
